name: Tournament FPS
tagline: Deepest-impact latency stack · pro-tier · measurable wins
description: The six tweaks pros run that paragontweaks/hone.gg don't ship: NIC interrupt moderation off, flow control off, RSS forced on, PCIe ASPM off, USB-3 link power off, core parking disabled. Every entry is a verified low-latency win documented in our Discord corpus, audited against Microsoft + community sources. NOT for laptops — the power tweaks here will eat battery hard. Pair with the regular Frame Pacing preset for kernel-timer coverage. Reboot recommended.
